comments: Love how MarbMarket is flipping the script on traditional DeFi governance by making voting power accessible to all, not just whales. The ve(3,3) model looks really promising!
The no-presale, fair launch approach is exactly what the space needs - finally a project where everyone starts on equal footing. Excited to see how the emissions play out!
This veDEX model could be game-changing if it delivers on the self-sustaining incentive system. Watching this space closely!
content:
Most DeFi builders still chase the same tired model. MarbMarket is building something different: a veDEX where your voting power matters more than your wallet size.

veDEX = Vote-Escrowed DEX. You lock MARB tokens, gain voting power, and decide where emissions flow. Projects can "bribe" for votes - creating a self-sustaining incentive system.

MARB flywheel: Lockers → direct emissions → LPs get rewards → protocols pay bribes → incentives flow back to lockers.

First veDEX on MegaETH with no presale, no VCs. Fair launch means everyone starts equal.

The future of DEX governance isn't about token price - it's about who controls the incentives.

Check them out: x.com/Marb_market

@RallyOnChain what other ve(3,3) models are you watching?
